w:r.w:t: The market is large, fast-growing, and underserved in the SMB/mid-market. Clay ($3.1B) validated enrichment. Nobody has built the full integrated stack at SMB pricing — that's Flowfiy's opening.
Apollo free = 10K emails/mo; Clay free = 100 credits/mo
Change 50 lifetime → 100/month. Current limit means users run out before reaching value.
Move from $249 → $299–$349. Still 10x cheaper than any alternative.
20% discount for annual billing. Improves cash flow, reduces churn.
Solo operators and freelancers first. Lowest friction, fastest conversion, best word-of-mouth.
Artisan/11x have burned trust with "AI replaces SDR" narrative. Position Flowfiy as AI-powered, human-controlled.
Bottom line: pricing is 85% right. Fix the Free tier and Agency plan before launch. The market is timing perfectly — AI SDR at $49/mo with ~70-80% gross margins is a structurally defensible position.
